title: Vietnamese-Style Grilled Pork and Noodle Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious Vietnamese-inspired dish featuring grilled pork, crispy noodles, and fresh vegetables. This recipe is perfect for a quick and easy dinner or lunch.
instructions: Cook the noodles according to package instructions.
Cut the tofu into small cubes and pan-fry until golden brown.
Grill the pork sausages until cooked through.
Slice the cha into thin strips and set aside.
Chop the cilantro, mint, and chilies.
In a small bowl, whisk together lime juice, soy sauce, hoisin sauce, and sugar.
Assemble the noodle bowls by placing cooked noodles at the bottom, followed by tofu, pork sausages, cha, and fresh herbs.
Drizzle the sauce over the top and serve immediately.
